title: Caladenia nortonii
taxonomy: Caladenia nortonii is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Caladenia, which is a group of terrestrial orchids native to Australia. The species is further classified as Caladenia nortonii within the section Calonemorchis. This classification is based on its unique characteristics, such as its white and yellow-brown colored flowers. The full classification of Caladenia nortonii is Caladenia nortonii (D.L.Jones) D.L.Jones & M.A.Clem.
